title: We’re making Bunny DNS free
author: dabinat
aiHeadline: Bunny DNS goes all in on free-for-all, because who doesn't love a good DNS party?

title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
author: jamdesk
aiHeadline: OpenAI finally gets its own custom chip, because apparently, every tech company now has to build their own silicon to prove they're not just a bunch of software posers.

title: Founding a company in Germany: €9600, 152 days and I still can't send an invoice
author: earcar
aiHeadline: Founding a company in Germany: a thrilling adventure that will leave you poorer, more frustrated, and still clueless about how to send an invoice—because nothing says 'Welcome to entrepreneurship' like a bureaucratic labyrinth.

title: There are a few things that I look back on as my mistakes in the early days
author: shadowtree
aiHeadline: John Carmack looks back on his early days and realizes that, yeah, maybe not hiring a professional manager and just winging it wasn't the best idea—spoiler alert: every startup founder eventually has this moment.

title: RubyLLM: A Ruby framework for all major AI providers
author: doener
aiHeadline: RubyLLM arrives just in time to remind everyone that Ruby is still alive and well—except in the AI world, where it's somehow managed to stay under the radar despite all the hype around other languages.
